refine_constraint: The answer must be concise, not exceed 10 characters in length, must not include any punctuation marks except comma, and must include the identifier "Answer" immediately before the numerical result. Additionally, the solution process must complete within 5 to 8 interaction turns and use between 4 to 7 tool calls in total.
constraint: (Interact, Call Times, "Range (The total number of tool calls must fall within a range of 4 to 7, inclusive.)")
